recommendations.title: Barely Lethal
recommendations.overview: A 16-year-old international assassin yearning for a "normal" adolescence fakes her own death and enrolls as a senior in a suburban high school. She quickly learns that being popular can be more painful than getting water-boarded.

recommendations.title: The Guardian
recommendations.overview: A high school swim champion with a troubled past enrolls in the U.S. Coast Guard's 'A' School, where legendary rescue swimmer Ben Randall teaches him some hard lessons about loss, love, and self-sacrifice.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: Love Don't Co$t a Thing
recommendations.overview: A high school outcast pays a cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend so he can be considered cool.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows two high school students -- one overachiever struggling to write his valedictorian speech, the other a senior now going on his 15th year of school.

recommendations.title: #realityhigh
recommendations.overview: When nerdy high schooler Dani finally attracts the interest of her longtime crush, she lands in the cross hairs of his ex, a social media celebrity.

recommendations.title: Girl
recommendations.overview: A promising teenage dancer enrolls at a prestigious ballet school while grappling with her gender dysphoria.

recommendations.title: Prom Pact
recommendations.overview: It's prom season, and high school senior Mandy and her best friend and fellow outsider Ben are surrounded by over-the-top "promposals." Mandy is only focused on getting into her dream school Harvard, but as she starts tutoring basketball all-star Gra

recommendations.title: 18 Year Old Virgin
recommendations.overview: In a series of sexual mishaps, a high school senior tries to lose her virginity on the last night before graduation.
